positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest at dawn. Giant bioluminescent flora structures cast glowing neon-blue and deep amethyst light onto moss-covered ground. Silhouettes of friendly, abstract woodland creatures (like glowing fox-like spirits and winged owl-like entities) wander through the mist. The composition is symmetrical and central, featuring clean, bold outlines and a high contrast between the dark, velvety forest background and the bright, saturated internal glow of the plants. Style: Pop Art meets Mystical Fantasy, highly vector-graphic, perfect for t-shirt print, flat graphic design, deep depth of field, vibrant color palette, UHD, volumetric light, cinematic composition.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, disfigured, cropped, oversaturated, photo, realism
